title: Custom Webhook provider config
description: Configuration shape for the generic HMAC-signed webhook provider. Enterprise-only. Escape hatch for tenants running their own payment gateway (Braintree direct, dLocal, PayFast, etc.). Requires PCI-DSS Level 1 attestation from the tenant admin before activation.

endpoint_url.description: HTTPS endpoint for outbound payment intents. HTTP is refused (TLS required).

hmac_secret.description: Shared secret for HMAC-SHA256 signing of outbound intent payloads AND for verifying inbound webhook signatures. 32 chars minimum. Encrypted at rest.

signature_header.description: HTTP header carrying the HMAC signature (outbound + inbound).

timestamp_header.description: HTTP header carrying the signature timestamp (Unix seconds).

signature_tolerance_seconds.description: Signature timestamp tolerance window. Prevents replay attacks.

supported_method_types.description: Payment method types this caller's endpoint accepts. Non-empty.

supported_currencies.description: ISO 4217 currency codes this caller's endpoint accepts. Non-empty.

supports_3ds2.description: Whether the caller's endpoint handles 3DS2 challenge flow. When true, the caller MUST return next_action_type='three_d_secure_redirect' or 'redirect_to_url' in their intent-create response.

supports_manual_capture.description: Whether the caller's endpoint supports authorization holds + delayed capture. When true, capture_method='manual' intents are permitted.

supports_saved_methods.description: Whether the caller's endpoint supports tokenized saved methods (SetupIntent-equivalent). When false, every PaymentIntent must include the full payment details in the create call.

custom_headers.description: Optional additional headers on every outbound dispatch. Useful for auth (Bearer token, API key). Values encrypted at rest.

pci_dss_attested.description: MUST be true. Tenant admin attests that the endpoint is PCI-DSS Level 1 compliant. Refused with PAYMENT_PROVIDER_CONFIG_INVALID if false. Every activation writes an audit row with the attesting user ID + timestamp.

attesting_user_id.description: The user ID of the admin who attested to PCI-DSS compliance. Populated by the observer at create time from auth.user.

attested_at.description: When the PCI-DSS attestation was signed. Populated by the observer at create time.
